title: Everything At Once
theme: the systems you learned separately now interlock
learningGoal: identify which single mechanic actually gates the jump when several are present
mentalModel: a crowded level still has exactly one decision that matters
misconceptions: more mechanics means more jumps are needed
every hazard on screen is part of the solution
subversion: the busiest-looking obstacle is a decoy and the quiet zone is the real gate
optimizationFocus: ignoring the decoy systems and committing to the one route that resolves them all
finalExam: clear a level combining three families with the one jump on the single decisive beat

levelSlots.intentSentence: Spend the one jump on the decisive observation read because the bare corridor offers no help and a habitual early commitment falls into the pit.
